## Bulk edit summary

**Persona group:** <!-- e.g., Developers -->
**Collections included:** <!-- comma-separated list -->
**Files edited:** <!-- number -->
**Bulk edit session ID:** <!-- from progress.json -->

---

## Style rules applied

- [ ] Active voice (two-pass check — highest priority)
- [ ] Present tense (no "will", "would", "going to")
- [ ] Contractions (don't, can't, isn't, etc.)
- [ ] Second person (you/your — no we/our/us)
- [ ] Direct instructions (no "please", imperative mood)
- [ ] Concise language (no "in order to", "via", "currently")
- [ ] Grammar and punctuation (Oxford comma, list items end with periods)
- [ ] Headings (sentence case, no end punctuation, starts at ##)
- [ ] Inclusive terminology (no blacklist/whitelist, no kill/abort, etc.)
- [ ] UI element formatting (bold for interactive, italics for navigation paths)
- [ ] Amplitude vocabulary (correct product names, approved spellings)

---

## Content integrity checks

- [ ] No `content/collections/*.yaml` collection config files modified
- [ ] No `content/navigation/*.yaml` nav group files modified
- [ ] No frontmatter fields modified (id, blueprint, title, updated_at, parent)
- [ ] No content inside `{{partial:...}}` Statamic tags modified
- [ ] No content inside code fences (``` blocks) modified
- [ ] No internal link paths modified (/docs/... links unchanged)
- [ ] No image file paths modified
